## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes (`ruff check src/ tests/ && mypy src/`)
- [ ] `make test` passes (`pytest -v`)
- [ ] Constitution compliance: changes align with `docs/CONSTITUTION.md` principles
- [ ] ADR: if this is an architectural decision, ADR is in `docs/adr/`
- [ ] No hardcoded keys or secrets
- [ ] Commit messages in English, imperative mood

## Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI

## Reviewer

Only @aptyp78 can merge. All agents acting on behalf of aptyp78 must follow this rule.
